content:
# Session 8 (iter-008) вАФ recommendations for next plan iter

## TOP вАФ structural blueprint fixes (HARD GATE risk; cheap; do FIRST)
blueprint-doctor flagged two issues that block clean gating and dag ingestion of Lane 1's output:

1. **Resolve the `ResidueFieldKbar.lean` double-cover.** `% archon:covers AlgebraicJacobian/RiemannRoch/ResidueFieldKbar.lean`
   appears in BOTH `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex:3` (planner anchor, iter-007) and the new
   `RiemannRoch_ResidueFieldKbar.tex:4`. Give the file exactly ONE owner. Recommended: keep the dedicated
   `RiemannRoch_ResidueFieldKbar.tex` as owner and **remove line 3 from `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex`**.
2. **Un-orphan `RiemannRoch_ResidueFieldKbar.tex`** вАФ add `\input{chapters/RiemannRoch_ResidueFieldKbar}` to
   `content.tex` (planner-domain edit). Until then the chapter never renders and the dag never ingests it (all 7
   decls currently show `chapter: ''`, unmatched), so the prover's `\leanok` markers and `\lean{}` pins are invisible.
3. **Blueprint the 4 unblueprinted ResidueFieldKbar decls** (coverage debt вАФ `dag-query unmatched`): the 3
   substantive ones вАФ `formallySmooth_of_algebraMap_bijective`, `subsingleton_kaehlerDifferential_of_algebraMap_bijective`,
   `subsingleton_h1Cotangent_of_algebraMap_bijective` (the residue-rationality interface SmoothStalkDVR consumes) вАФ
   plus the helper `algEquivOfAlgebraMapBijective`. Dispatch a blueprint-writer for the ResidueFieldKbar chapter to
   add `\lean{}` lemma blocks for these (and the 3 already-blueprinted lemmas keep their blocks).

(All gated behind a blueprint-writer + blueprint-clean + the standard HARD-GATE re-review on the ResidueFieldKbar
chapter before any further prover lane touches that file.)

## Closest to completion вАФ prioritize
- **`AlgebraicGeometry.residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one`** (ResidueFieldKbar Lane 1). Both math halves done
  (decl 2 affine bijection + decl 7 closedness). Remaining = the scheme-presentation bridge:
  (1) define `residueFieldAlgebra : Algebra kbar (C.left.residueField x)` from `C.hom`
  (`Scheme.Hom.residueFieldMap` вИШ `Scheme.Spec.residueFieldIso` вИШ `Ideal.algEquivResidueFieldOfField`) вАФ NOT
  synthesizable, thread explicitly;
  (2) identify `C.left.residueField x вЙЕ p.asIdeal.ResidueField` at the closed point
  (`IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_stalk` + `hU.primeIdealOf`; `IsClosed {x}` from decl 7 вЯє `p` maximal);
  (3) supply `Order.krullDim (ќ± := C.left) вЙ§ 1` вАФ **first do the concrete lookup** for a Mathlib form of
  `topologicalKrullDim X = Order.krullDim (ќ± := X)` (NOT yet checked; if absent it is a sub-lemma to build).
  This is the SAME chart-extraction class as Lane 2 вАФ see the shared-bottleneck note below.

## Shared bottleneck вАФ DO NOT re-dispatch as a plain prover round
- **Chart-extraction / non-synthesizable-`kћД`-algebra-on-stalk blocks BOTH lanes.** Lane 2
  (`SmoothStalkDVR.lean` scheme pins) made NO landable progress iter-008: the prover attempted (~30 log events)
  but committed nothing and wrote no task_result; the 3 scheme pins remain handoff comments. The abstract algebra
  core is ready; the missing piece is the ~150вАУ250 LOC scheme wrapper (extract affine `Spec S вИЛ x`,
  `рЭТ™_{C,x}=S_рЭФЃ`, `letI` the kћД-algebra from `C.hom`, `appLE`-standard-smoothness after `ќУ(Spec kћД)=kћД`).
  **Recommendation: dispatch effort-breaker on the chart-extraction step FIRST** (split the affine-chart-extraction
  + non-global-instance-threading into named sub-lemmas), THEN a prover round on the small pieces. The same
  decomposition feeds Lane 1 step (1)вАУ(2). Re-running either lane as a monolithic prover round will churn.
- This is also the upstream the OcOfD skyscraper-cokernel iso (S3) waits on вАФ keep S3 deferred until the
  DVR-stalk + closed-point facts actually land (per iter-008 plan's dated iter-009 re-engagement).

## Blocked вАФ do NOT re-assign without structural change
- `SmoothStalkDVR` 3 scheme pins (above) вАФ effort-break the chart-extraction first.
- `residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one` scheme glue (above) вАФ needs the chart bridge + the krullDim lookup.

## Reusable proof patterns (added to PROJECT_STATUS KB iter-008)
- ќЇ(x)=kћД affine heart: `algebraMap_residueField_surjective` вЖТ `FiniteType.of_surjective` вЖТ
  `finite_of_finite_type_of_isJacobsonRing` вЖТ `IsAlgClosed.algebraMap_bijective_of_isIntegral`.
- Rationality corollaries by `AlgEquiv.ofBijective (Algebra.ofId kћД K)` + `*.of_equiv` transport.
- coheight-1 вЯє closed: `krullDim = sup(height+coheight)` + ENat arith вЯє `height=0`=`IsMin`; scheme order
  `x вЙ§ y вЖФ y в§≥ x` by `rfl`.

## Minor (.lean doc drifts вАФ route to next prover touching the file; review can't edit .lean)
- `ResidueFieldKbar.lean` module docstring says "integral curve" but `isClosed_singleton_of_coheight_eq_one` is
  stated for any `Scheme` with `krullDim вЙ§ 1`. Tighten the docstring.
- `SmoothStalkDVR.lean` handoff comment hard-codes `(L635)` cross-file line ref вАФ will rot; make it name-based.
